tracks.rawText: 2:58The city learns to listen closeUploadContemporary R&B and Neo-Soul track featuring a female vocalist with a smooth, breathy delivery and occasional falsetto, The arrangement is built around a syncopated, mid-tempo groove at 92 BPM in the key of G minor, A clean, jazz-influenced electric guitar provides rhythmic stabs and melodic fills, The bass guitar follows a melodic, walking pattern that emphasizes the groove, Percussion consists of a crisp snare, tight hi-hats, and a subtle kick drum, Atmospheric synth pads and light reverb on the vocals create a spacious mix, The structure features a prominent melodic hook in the chorus with layered vocal harmonies4PublishRemix
tracks.title: The city learns to listen close

tracks.rawText: 3:30__Título_ “De la Risa a la Luz”__UploadLatin pop with a strong reggae influence and acoustic elements, The arrangement features a rhythmic acoustic guitar playing syncopated upstroke chords, a melodic electric bass with a rounded tone, and a drum kit performing a steady one-drop reggae beat with a prominent rimshot on the third beat, A bright, clean electric guitar provides melodic fills and a rhythmic solo section with a slight chorus effect, Subtle brass stabs and a shaker provide additional rhythmic texture, The lead male vocals are clear and melodic, delivered with a rhythmic, almost conversational flow in the verses and a more sustained, anthemic style in the choruses, The tempo is 95 BPM in the key of G Major7PublishRemix
tracks.title: __Título_ “De la Risa a la Luz”__
